---
title: "API Workshop"
---

# Welcome to the API Workshop

**Empowering educators with the skills to extract real-world data using APIs.**

This workshop covers the fundamentals of working with web APIs — from understanding JSON and HTTP methods to making real requests and building visualizations with live data.

---

## Workshop Schedule

| Day | Time | Session | Focus |
|-----|------|---------|-------|
| Day 1 (8/5) | 8:00–9:00 AM | [Session 1](sessions/01_JSON_and_Request_Response.qmd) | JSON Fundamentals & Request/Response |
| Day 1 (8/5) | 9:00–10:00 AM | [Session 2](sessions/02_CRUD_HTTP_Methods_URL.qmd) | CRUD, HTTP Methods, URL Anatomy & Dummy Server |
| Day 2 (8/6) | 9:00–10:00 AM | [Session 3](sessions/03_Weather_API_Setup.qmd) | Weather API — Setup, Current Weather, Geocoding |
| Day 2 (8/6) | 10:00–11:00 AM | [Session 4](sessions/04_Historical_Weather_Visualization.qmd) | Historical Weather, Visualization & Wrap-Up |

---

## Tools

- **IDE:** Positron (RStudio compatible)
- **Language:** R with tidyverse
- **Key Packages:** `httr2`, `glue`, `dplyr`, `ggplot2`, `lubridate`, `dotenv`
- **API:** OpenWeather API

---

## Getting Started

Head over to **[Session 1](sessions/01_JSON_and_Request_Response.qmd)** to begin!
